name: Sensors Data
description: Sensors Data — Chinese enterprise behavioral analytics platform with event tracking and user journey analysis.

seo.title: Sensors Data — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Sensors Data: Sensors Data — Chinese enterprise behavioral analytics platform with event tracking and user journey analysis.

when_to_use: Behavioral analytics with event tracking for Chinese apps
User journey analysis for Chinese e-commerce conversion
Enterprise analytics on-premise for data sovereignty
Custom event schema for complex Chinese product analytics

pros: Enterprise-grade behavioral analytics at Chinese scale
Flexible event model and user journey analysis
Strong reference set among Chinese enterprises
cons: UI favors power users over casual analysts
review.verdict: A Chinese Mixpanel/Amplitude equivalent with enterprise on-prem options; best when data must stay in China.
review.best_for: Chinese enterprises needing deep behavioral analytics with on-prem or local deployment.
review.not_for: Western SaaS, SMBs, or teams wanting warehouse-native or self-serve tools.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
